skills.doc.title: 📖  {name}
skills.item.usb_wifi.name: USB-WiFi Driver Adaptation
skills.item.usb_wifi.desc: Automatically detect USB-WiFi adapter model and install drivers, supporting RTL8811/8812/8821CU series
skills.item.usb_wifi_88x2bu.name: USB-WiFi 88x2bu Driver
skills.item.usb_wifi_88x2bu.desc: Install RTL88x2BU series USB-WiFi drivers commonly used with reComputer external adapters
skills.item.5g_modem.name: 5G Modem Driver Install
skills.item.5g_modem.desc: Install and configure drivers for mainstream 5G modules such as Quectel EC20/EC25/EM05/RM500Q
skills.item.fix_browser.name: Browser Launch Repair
skills.item.fix_browser.desc: Fix Chromium/Firefox crashes or launch failures on Jetson
skills.item.fix_bt_wifi.name: Bluetooth WiFi Conflict Repair
skills.item.fix_bt_wifi.desc: Resolve interference and disconnection when Bluetooth and WiFi share the 2.4GHz band
skills.item.fix_nvme.name: NVMe SSD Boot Repair
skills.item.fix_nvme.desc: Diagnose and repair NVMe SSD mount and boot failures
skills.item.fix_docker_space.name: Docker Disk Space Cleanup
skills.item.fix_docker_space.desc: Clean dangling images, stopped containers, and unused volumes to free storage
skills.item.install_torch.name: GPU PyTorch Install
skills.item.install_torch.desc: Install CUDA-enabled PyTorch and auto-select the matching wheel for the JetPack version
skills.item.install_jtop.name: jtop Monitor Install
skills.item.install_jtop.desc: Install jetson-stats for a real-time GPU/CPU/memory monitoring dashboard
skills.item.install_docker.name: Docker Environment Initialization
skills.item.install_docker.desc: Install Docker Engine, configure mirror acceleration, and add the current user to the docker group
skills.item.lerobot.name: LeRobot Development Environment Setup
skills.item.lerobot.desc: Configure the Hugging Face LeRobot robotics development toolkit with one click
skills.item.qwen_demo.name: Qwen2 Inference Environment
skills.item.qwen_demo.desc: Configure Qwen2 model inference on Jetson (transformers + accelerate)
skills.item.install_ollama.name: Ollama Service Deployment
skills.item.install_ollama.desc: Install Ollama for local inference with Llama, Qwen, Mistral, and other models
skills.item.deepseek_deploy.name: DeepSeek Local Deployment
skills.item.install_frigate.name: Frigate NVR Deployment
skills.item.install_frigate.desc: Deploy local AI video monitoring with Frigate through Docker, supporting multiple cameras
skills.item.install_yolov8.name: YOLOv8 Environment Setup
skills.item.install_yolov8.desc: Install Ultralytics YOLOv8 adapted for Jetson GPU inference
skills.item.vscode_server.name: VS Code Server Deployment
skills.item.vscode_server.desc: Deploy code-server on Jetson for remote coding from a browser
skills.item.vnc_setup.name: VNC Remote Desktop Setup
skills.item.vnc_setup.desc: Configure x11vnc for remote access to the Jetson desktop through a VNC client
skills.item.ssh_keygen.name: SSH Passwordless Login Setup
skills.item.ssh_keygen.desc: Generate an RSA key pair and configure passwordless login to the target host
skills.item.proxy_config.name: Network Proxy Configuration
skills.item.proxy_config.desc: Configure a unified HTTP proxy for apt / pip / docker
skills.item.max_performance.name: Maximum Performance Mode
skills.item.max_performance.desc: Enable maximum power mode plus jetson_clocks for inference/training workloads
skills.item.swap_setup.name: Swap Memory Expansion (8GB)
skills.item.swap_setup.desc: Create and persist an 8GB swap file to expand available memory for large-model inference
skills.item.fan_fullspeed.name: Fan Full Speed
skills.item.fan_fullspeed.desc: Set fan speed to maximum for high-load scenarios
skills.item.clear_cache.name: System Cache Cleanup
skills.item.clear_cache.desc: Clean apt cache, pip cache, and system logs to free disk space
skills.item.software_upgrade.name: System Software Upgrade
skills.item.software_upgrade.desc: Upgrade all installed system packages to the latest version
